window.label: Entire history
window.phrase: the entire available history up to 2026-07-22

evidence.claim: Masdar expands the 200 MW Baynouna Solar Energy Project with a new storage system in October 2024.
evidence.snippet: Masdar completed a major utility-scale battery storage upgrade at Jordan's Baynouna Solar Energy Project to stabilize the national grid.

evidence.claim: AD Ports Group completes the digital transformation of Aqaba Port using Maqta Gateway systems in January 2025.
evidence.snippet: AD Ports Group's digital arm, Maqta Gateway, deployed its advanced Port Community System at Jordan's Aqaba Port terminals.

evidence.claim: ADFD signs a $400 million development package for Jordan's healthcare and road infrastructure in November 2024.
evidence.snippet: The Abu Dhabi Fund for Development signed an agreement with Jordan to fund vital hospital expansions and highway infrastructure.

evidence.claim: UAE and Jordan sign a $2 billion investment memorandum targeting Jordan's railway infrastructure in July 2024.
evidence.snippet: UAE and Jordan finalized a $2 billion investment memorandum to develop a national freight railway system connecting mining sites to Aqaba.

evidence.claim: EDGE Group partners with Jordan's JODDB for joint development of unmanned aerial vehicles in September 2024.
evidence.snippet: EDGE Group signed a strategic development agreement with Jordan's JODDB to collaborate on localized production of tactical UAVs.

evidence.claim: G42 collaborates with Jordan's Ministry of Digital Economy to build a national cloud data center in February 2025.
evidence.snippet: G42 signed a memorandum to construct Jordan's first sovereign cloud data center in Amman for public sector AI services.

evidence.claim: Project Prosperity solar-for-water tripartite negotiations continued among the UAE, Jordan, and Israel in late 2024.
evidence.snippet: UAE-sponsored negotiations for Project Prosperity progressed, focusing on Masdar's solar plant installation in Jordan for export.

evidence.claim: Mubadala explores renewable energy storage investments in Jordan's East region in May 2025.
evidence.snippet: Mubadala held bilateral discussions with Jordanian energy officials to deploy commercial battery storage projects.

evidence.claim: Etihad Airways increases flight frequencies to Amman to support bilateral tourism growth in June 2025.
evidence.snippet: Etihad Airways expanded its Abu Dhabi-Amman service to double daily flights, citing surging travel and logistics demands.

evidence.claim: Wizz Air Abu Dhabi expands low-cost routes between Aqaba and Abu Dhabi in late 2024.
evidence.snippet: Wizz Air Abu Dhabi expanded its route network to Aqaba, enhancing low-cost connectivity and business tourism between the UAE and Jordan.

edges.claim: Masdar expands the 200 MW Baynouna Solar Energy Project with a new storage system in October 2024.
AD Ports Group completes the digital transformation of Aqaba Port using Maqta Gateway systems in January 2025.
ADFD signs a $400 million development package for Jordan's healthcare and road infrastructure in November 2024.
UAE and Jordan sign a $2 billion investment memorandum targeting Jordan's railway infrastructure in July 2024.
EDGE Group partners with Jordan's JODDB for joint development of unmanned aerial vehicles in September 2024.
G42 collaborates with Jordan's Ministry of Digital Economy to build a national cloud data center in February 2025.
Mubadala explores renewable energy storage investments in Jordan's East region in May 2025.
Etihad Airways increases flight frequencies to Amman to support bilateral tourism growth in June 2025.
Wizz Air Abu Dhabi expands low-cost routes between Aqaba and Abu Dhabi in late 2024.
